channel.title: Open Source on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Open Source on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Open vs Closed AI: The Shift Reshaping Tech Giants
item.description: Tech leaders debate open AI models vs proprietary systems, with Hugging Face and Microsoft advocating for transparency and control.

item.title: Open AI Launches Bug Fix
item.description: Open AI launches initiative to find and patch open source bugs with Trail of Bits

item.title: Kyber: The Secret Tech Powering Millions of Future Robots
item.description: How VLC’s creator built Kyber, an SDK to control robots in real-time with zero lag. Discover its tech, use cases, and why Lightspeed invested $5M.
